TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: Lmwan留茂安部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == cyan maki te inu qa qalang 部落概況與位置 == qalang Lmwan hiya ga, cyux maki te syaw na llyung Mnibu. gluw na Mnibu ru mtiyu kbhul meta kinwagiq nya.cyugal qalang qu qalang Lmwan hiya, te qutux qalang ga, qalang Hogal son myan,te saying qalang lga, qalang Trasan son myan, te pucing lga, qalang Hetay son myan. qalang Hogal,第二部落為嘉新巷qalang Trasan,第三部落為嘉盛巷qalang Hetay cinllwan na qalang 地名由來 skahul ta pinq_ywan na bnkis myan mha, sinllwan na qalang Lmwan hiya ga, kya qutux nanak qu pinq_ywan nya. wal myan pnongan. skahul ta ke nqu Tayal hiya ga, skahul squ "lamu" qu ke na Tayal, ru te suru nya lga, twangan qutux "-an" yasa son mha "Lmwan"ma. ana mtnaq qu ubuy nqu qalang Lmwan ga, baha hmswa, ini ptnaq qu bnkis ru puqing ta sraral. kruma minkahul squ qalang Skikun, ini ga, minkahul squ Sqoyaw ru Slamaw. sinllwan nqu qalang Lmwan hiya ga, giwan son mha minkahul squ ini ptnaq na pinsalan ta ru pucing lga, mwah mshzi te qalang Lmwan ma. ru pucing lga, mwah tmqalang kya kwara la. ,Lmwan ,Lmwan是從詞根"lamu" ."lamu"後面加上處所 - an,衍生為Lmwan.由於Lmwan Lmwan . pinhknyan qalang 部落遷徙 pinq_ywan nqu qutux qalang ga, iyat ta skahul squ qutux qalang nanak. aki ta skahul squ qutux gaga. baha hmswa, ini ptnaq qu gaga nha ga, ini ptnaq qu pinhkngyan na qutux gaga nha uzi. kya qu cyugal binkgan na pinkngyan nha. te qutux pinhkngyan: Pinbskan->Maripa->Plmwan->Slamaw->Tabuk->Sqoyaw-> quri Sqabu->Pyanan->Tayax(Skikun)->Thbu->Byugan->Melayan ->Lmwan te saying pinhkngyan: Pinsbkan->Qwang->Slamaw ->Tabuk->Sqoyaw-> Quri sqabu->Pyanan->Mnoyan->Tayax-> Melayan->Lmwan te cyugal pinhkngyan: Pinsbkan->Maripa->Plmwan->Slamaw->Tabuk->Sqoyaw-> Quri sqabu->Pyanan->Tayax-> Melayan->Lmwan 第一個遷徙路線: Pinsbkan ->Maripa ->Plmwan ->Slamaw ->Tabuk ->Sqoyaw ->Quri sqabu ->Pyanan ->Mnoyan ->Tayax ->Thbu ->Byugan ->Melayan ->Lmwan 第二個遷徙路線: Pinsbkan ->Qwang ->Slamaw -> Tabuk ->Sqoyaw -> Quri sqabu ->Pyanan ->Mnoyan ->Tayax -> Melayan ->Lmwan 第三個遷徙路線: Pinsbkan ->Maripa ->Plmwan ->Slamaw ->Tabuk ->Sqoyaw -> Quri sqabu ->Pyanan ->Tayax -> Melayan ->Lmwan yaw na ccquliq 人口概況 kya musa saying kbhul msyaw hi qu qalang Lmwan, piyux balay mrkyas wal mhriq squ hogal, musa hmkangi te hogal. nanu tehuk squ ryax na hngawan lga, yasa mwah cikah qalang lha. . sinnhyan宗教信仰 mwani hiya ga, saying kyokay qu qalang Lmwan. qutux ga, Tensinkyo, te saying lga,Cyorokyokay. Tensinkyo kyokay ga, cyux maki te qalang Hogal. Cyorokyokay lga, cyux maki te qalang Trasan. qalang Hogal, qalang Trasan. qqyanux經濟與特產 te qutux:tmana ru tbihi qalang Lmwan hiya, pmiyun nha tmana ru tbihi, minsaying qu pinnuya nha rramat maki squ qutux kawas qani. aring squ tmanguw abaw(te saying byacing) lga, pmiyun nha tmana la, tehuk squ te magal byacing lga, lmun nha tmana la, ru tehuk squ te mtiyu byacing lga, pmiyun nha tmana loyi, kya tehuk squ te mspat byacing kutun nha tmana la. te saying:ali ru ruma Tayal qalang Lmwan hiya ga, aring squ sraral, piyux balay nha pmiyan ruma Tayal. kya tehuk squ te magal byacing. mhtuw kwara qu ali' la. te cyugal:yutak ru kaway ramu qalang Lmwan ga, aring squ sraral qalang Lmwan wal rema pmiyan yutak ru kaway ramu. tehuk squ te qutux byacing ga, mkbway kwara qu yutak la. tehuk ryax qasa lga, lmun nha yutak la. kaway ramu hiya ga, tehuk squ te magal byacing lga, mkbway qu bway na kaway ramu la. kahul squ Girang skura te llyung Mnibu, gmluw squ te mpitu bang tuqiy osa qalang Lmwan. si shiyu musa ru, hminas squ家源橋lga, tehuk su kya te mopuw saying kinthiyaq nya lga, ptehok su qalang Lmwan la. ungat
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjan maki te inu qa qalaŋ ******* == qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki te s~ɕjaw na lljuŋ mniβu. ɣluw na mniβu ru mtiju kβħul meta kinwaɣiq nja.ʦ~ʨjuɣal qalaŋ qu qalaŋ lmwan ħija, te qutux qalaŋ ɣa, qalaŋ ħoɣal s~ɕon mjan,te s~ɕajiŋ qalaŋ lɣa, qalaŋ tras~ɕan s~ɕon mjan, te puʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, qalaŋ ħetaj s~ɕon mjan. qalaŋ ħoɣal,********qalaŋ tras~ɕan,********qalaŋ ħetaj ʦ~ʨinllwan na qalaŋ **** s~ɕkaħul ta pinqəjwan na βnkis~ɕ mjan mħa, s~ɕinllwan na qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, kja qutux nanak qu pinqəjwan nja. wal mjan pnoŋan. s~ɕkaħul ta ke nqu tajal ħija ɣa, s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu "lamu" qu ke na tajal, ru te s~ɕuru nja lɣa, twaŋan qutux "-an" jas~ɕa s~ɕon mħa "lmwan"ma. ana mtnaq qu uβuj nqu qalaŋ lmwan ɣa, βaħa ħms~ɕwa, ini ptnaq qu βnkis~ɕ ru puqiŋ ta s~ɕraral. kruma minkaħul s~ɕqu qalaŋ s~ɕkikun, ini ɣa, minkaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕqojaw ru s~ɕlamaw. s~ɕinllwan nqu qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, ɣiwan s~ɕon mħa minkaħul s~ɕqu ini ptnaq na pins~ɕalan ta ru puʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, mwaħ ms~ɕħzi te qalaŋ lmwan ma. ru puʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, mwaħ tmqalaŋ kja kwara la. ,lmwan ,lmwan****"lamu" ."lamu"****** - an,***lmwan.**lmwan lmwan . pinħknjan qalaŋ **** pinqəjwan nqu qutux qalaŋ ɣa, ijat ta s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu qutux qalaŋ nanak. aki ta s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu qutux ɣaɣa. βaħa ħms~ɕwa, ini ptnaq qu ɣaɣa nħa ɣa, ini ptnaq qu pinħkŋjan na qutux ɣaɣa nħa uzi. kja qu ʦ~ʨjuɣal βinkɣan na pinkŋjan nħa. te qutux pinħkŋjan: pinβs~ɕkan->maripa->plmwan->s~ɕlamaw->taβuk->s~ɕqojaw-> quri s~ɕqaβu->pjanan->tajax(s~ɕkikun)->tħβu->βjuɣan->melajan ->lmwan te s~ɕajiŋ pinħkŋjan: pins~ɕβkan->qwaŋ->s~ɕlamaw ->taβuk->s~ɕqojaw-> quri s~ɕqaβu->pjanan->mnojan->tajax-> melajan->lmwan te ʦ~ʨjuɣal pinħkŋjan: pins~ɕβkan->maripa->plmwan->s~ɕlamaw->taβuk->s~ɕqojaw-> quri s~ɕqaβu->pjanan->tajax-> melajan->lmwan *******: pins~ɕβkan ->maripa ->plmwan ->s~ɕlamaw ->taβuk ->s~ɕqojaw ->quri s~ɕqaβu ->pjanan ->mnojan ->tajax ->tħβu ->βjuɣan ->melajan ->lmwan *******: pins~ɕβkan ->qwaŋ ->s~ɕlamaw -> taβuk ->s~ɕqojaw -> quri s~ɕqaβu ->pjanan ->mnojan ->tajax -> melajan ->lmwan *******: pins~ɕβkan ->maripa ->plmwan ->s~ɕlamaw ->taβuk ->s~ɕqojaw -> quri s~ɕqaβu ->pjanan ->tajax -> melajan ->lmwan jaw na ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq **** kja mus~ɕa s~ɕajiŋ kβħul ms~ɕjaw ħi qu qalaŋ lmwan, pijux βalaj mrkjas~ɕ wal mħriq s~ɕqu ħoɣal, mus~ɕa ħmkaŋi te ħoɣal. nanu teħuk s~ɕqu rjax na ħŋawan lɣa, jas~ɕa mwaħ ʦ~ʨikaħ qalaŋ lħa. . s~ɕinnħjan**** mwani ħija ɣa, s~ɕajiŋ kjokaj qu qalaŋ lmwan. qutux ɣa, tens~ɕinkjo, te s~ɕajiŋ lɣa,ʦ~ʨjorokjokaj. tens~ɕinkjo kjokaj ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki te qalaŋ ħoɣal. ʦ~ʨjorokjokaj lɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki te qalaŋ tras~ɕan. qalaŋ ħoɣal, qalaŋ tras~ɕan. qqjanux***** te qutux:tmana ru tβiħi qalaŋ lmwan ħija, pmijun nħa tmana ru tβiħi, mins~ɕajiŋ qu pinnuja nħa rramat maki s~ɕqu qutux kawas~ɕ qani. ariŋ s~ɕqu tmaŋuw aβaw(te s~ɕajiŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ) lɣa, pmijun nħa tmana la, teħuk s~ɕqu te maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, lmun nħa tmana la, ru teħuk s~ɕqu te mtiju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, pmijun nħa tmana loji, kja teħuk s~ɕqu te ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kutun nħa tmana la. te s~ɕajiŋ:ali ru ruma tajal qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕraral, pijux βalaj nħa pmijan ruma tajal. kja teħuk s~ɕqu te maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ. mħtuw kwara qu aliʔ la. te ʦ~ʨjuɣal:jutak ru kawaj ramu qalaŋ lmwan ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕraral qalaŋ lmwan wal rema pmijan jutak ru kawaj ramu. teħuk s~ɕqu te qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa, mkβwaj kwara qu jutak la. teħuk rjax qas~ɕa lɣa, lmun nħa jutak la. kawaj ramu ħija ɣa, teħuk s~ɕqu te maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, mkβwaj qu βwaj na kawaj ramu la. kaħul s~ɕqu ɣiraŋ s~ɕkura te lljuŋ mniβu, ɣmluw s~ɕqu te mpitu βaŋ tuqij os~ɕa qalaŋ lmwan. s~ɕi s~ɕħiju mus~ɕa ru, ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu***lɣa, teħuk s~ɕu kja te mopuw s~ɕajiŋ kintħijaq nja lɣa, pteħok s~ɕu qalaŋ lmwan la. uŋat
S.FORM: == cyan maki te inu qa qalang 部落概況與位置 == qalang Lmwan hiya ga, cyux maki te syaw na llyung Mnibu. gluw na Mnibu ru mtiyu kbhul meta kinwagiq nya.cyugal qalang qu qalang Lmwan hiya, te qutux qalang ga, qalang Hogal son myan,te saying qalang lga, qalang Trasan son myan, te pucing lga, qalang Hetay son myan. qalang Hogal,第二部落為嘉新巷qalang Trasan,第三部落為嘉盛巷qalang Hetay cinllwan na qalang 地名由來 skahul ta pinq_ywan na bnkis myan mha, sinllwan na qalang Lmwan hiya ga, kya qutux nanak qu pinq_ywan nya. wal myan pnongan. skahul ta ke nqu Tayal hiya ga, skahul squ "lamu" qu ke na Tayal, ru te suru nya lga, twangan qutux "-an" yasa son mha "Lmwan"ma. ana mtnaq qu ubuy nqu qalang Lmwan ga, baha hmswa, ini ptnaq qu bnkis ru puqing ta sraral. kruma minkahul squ qalang Skikun, ini ga, minkahul squ Sqoyaw ru Slamaw. sinllwan nqu qalang Lmwan hiya ga, giwan son mha minkahul squ ini ptnaq na pinsalan ta ru pucing lga, mwah mshzi te qalang Lmwan ma. ru pucing lga, mwah tmqalang kya kwara la. ,Lmwan ,Lmwan是從詞根"lamu" ."lamu"後面加上處所 - an,衍生為Lmwan.由於Lmwan Lmwan . pinhknyan qalang 部落遷徙 pinq_ywan nqu qutux qalang ga, iyat ta skahul squ qutux qalang nanak. aki ta skahul squ qutux gaga. baha hmswa, ini ptnaq qu gaga nha ga, ini ptnaq qu pinhkngyan na qutux gaga nha uzi. kya qu cyugal binkgan na pinkngyan nha. te qutux pinhkngyan: Pinbskan->Maripa->Plmwan->Slamaw->Tabuk->Sqoyaw-> quri Sqabu->Pyanan->Tayax(Skikun)->Thbu->Byugan->Melayan ->Lmwan te saying pinhkngyan: Pinsbkan->Qwang->Slamaw ->Tabuk->Sqoyaw-> Quri sqabu->Pyanan->Mnoyan->Tayax-> Melayan->Lmwan te cyugal pinhkngyan: Pinsbkan->Maripa->Plmwan->Slamaw->Tabuk->Sqoyaw-> Quri sqabu->Pyanan->Tayax-> Melayan->Lmwan 第一個遷徙路線: Pinsbkan ->Maripa ->Plmwan ->Slamaw ->Tabuk ->Sqoyaw ->Quri sqabu ->Pyanan ->Mnoyan ->Tayax ->Thbu ->Byugan ->Melayan ->Lmwan 第二個遷徙路線: Pinsbkan ->Qwang ->Slamaw -> Tabuk ->Sqoyaw -> Quri sqabu ->Pyanan ->Mnoyan ->Tayax -> Melayan ->Lmwan 第三個遷徙路線: Pinsbkan ->Maripa ->Plmwan ->Slamaw ->Tabuk ->Sqoyaw -> Quri sqabu ->Pyanan ->Tayax -> Melayan ->Lmwan yaw na ccquliq 人口概況 kya musa saying kbhul msyaw hi qu qalang Lmwan, piyux balay mrkyas wal mhriq squ hogal, musa hmkangi te hogal. nanu tehuk squ ryax na hngawan lga, yasa mwah cikah qalang lha. . sinnhyan宗教信仰 mwani hiya ga, saying kyokay qu qalang Lmwan. qutux ga, Tensinkyo, te saying lga,Cyorokyokay. Tensinkyo kyokay ga, cyux maki te qalang Hogal. Cyorokyokay lga, cyux maki te qalang Trasan. qalang Hogal, qalang Trasan. qqyanux經濟與特產 te qutux:tmana ru tbihi qalang Lmwan hiya, pmiyun nha tmana ru tbihi, minsaying qu pinnuya nha rramat maki squ qutux kawas qani. aring squ tmanguw abaw(te saying byacing) lga, pmiyun nha tmana la, tehuk squ te magal byacing lga, lmun nha tmana la, ru tehuk squ te mtiyu byacing lga, pmiyun nha tmana loyi, kya tehuk squ te mspat byacing kutun nha tmana la. te saying:ali ru ruma Tayal qalang Lmwan hiya ga, aring squ sraral, piyux balay nha pmiyan ruma Tayal. kya tehuk squ te magal byacing. mhtuw kwara qu ali' la. te cyugal:yutak ru kaway ramu qalang Lmwan ga, aring squ sraral qalang Lmwan wal rema pmiyan yutak ru kaway ramu. tehuk squ te qutux byacing ga, mkbway kwara qu yutak la. tehuk ryax qasa lga, lmun nha yutak la. kaway ramu hiya ga, tehuk squ te magal byacing lga, mkbway qu bway na kaway ramu la. kahul squ Girang skura te llyung Mnibu, gmluw squ te mpitu bang tuqiy osa qalang Lmwan. si shiyu musa ru, hminas squ家源橋lga, tehuk su kya te mopuw saying kinthiyaq nya lga, ptehok su qalang Lmwan la. ungat
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjan maki te inu qa qalaŋ ******* == qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki te s~ɕjaw na lljuŋ mniβu. ɣluw na mniβu ru mtiju kβħul meta kinwaɣiq nja.ʦ~ʨjuɣal qalaŋ qu qalaŋ lmwan ħija, te qutux qalaŋ ɣa, qalaŋ ħoɣal s~ɕon mjan,te s~ɕajiŋ qalaŋ lɣa, qalaŋ tras~ɕan s~ɕon mjan, te puʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, qalaŋ ħetaj s~ɕon mjan. qalaŋ ħoɣal,********qalaŋ tras~ɕan,********qalaŋ ħetaj ʦ~ʨinllwan na qalaŋ **** s~ɕkaħul ta pinqəjwan na βnkis~ɕ mjan mħa, s~ɕinllwan na qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, kja qutux nanak qu pinqəjwan nja. wal mjan pnoŋan. s~ɕkaħul ta ke nqu tajal ħija ɣa, s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu "lamu" qu ke na tajal, ru te s~ɕuru nja lɣa, twaŋan qutux "-an" jas~ɕa s~ɕon mħa "lmwan"ma. ana mtnaq qu uβuj nqu qalaŋ lmwan ɣa, βaħa ħms~ɕwa, ini ptnaq qu βnkis~ɕ ru puqiŋ ta s~ɕraral. kruma minkaħul s~ɕqu qalaŋ s~ɕkikun, ini ɣa, minkaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕqojaw ru s~ɕlamaw. s~ɕinllwan nqu qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, ɣiwan s~ɕon mħa minkaħul s~ɕqu ini ptnaq na pins~ɕalan ta ru puʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, mwaħ ms~ɕħzi te qalaŋ lmwan ma. ru puʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, mwaħ tmqalaŋ kja kwara la. ,lmwan ,lmwan****"lamu" ."lamu"****** - an,***lmwan.**lmwan lmwan . pinħknjan qalaŋ **** pinqəjwan nqu qutux qalaŋ ɣa, ijat ta s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu qutux qalaŋ nanak. aki ta s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu qutux ɣaɣa. βaħa ħms~ɕwa, ini ptnaq qu ɣaɣa nħa ɣa, ini ptnaq qu pinħkŋjan na qutux ɣaɣa nħa uzi. kja qu ʦ~ʨjuɣal βinkɣan na pinkŋjan nħa. te qutux pinħkŋjan: pinβs~ɕkan->maripa->plmwan->s~ɕlamaw->taβuk->s~ɕqojaw-> quri s~ɕqaβu->pjanan->tajax(s~ɕkikun)->tħβu->βjuɣan->melajan ->lmwan te s~ɕajiŋ pinħkŋjan: pins~ɕβkan->qwaŋ->s~ɕlamaw ->taβuk->s~ɕqojaw-> quri s~ɕqaβu->pjanan->mnojan->tajax-> melajan->lmwan te ʦ~ʨjuɣal pinħkŋjan: pins~ɕβkan->maripa->plmwan->s~ɕlamaw->taβuk->s~ɕqojaw-> quri s~ɕqaβu->pjanan->tajax-> melajan->lmwan *******: pins~ɕβkan ->maripa ->plmwan ->s~ɕlamaw ->taβuk ->s~ɕqojaw ->quri s~ɕqaβu ->pjanan ->mnojan ->tajax ->tħβu ->βjuɣan ->melajan ->lmwan *******: pins~ɕβkan ->qwaŋ ->s~ɕlamaw -> taβuk ->s~ɕqojaw -> quri s~ɕqaβu ->pjanan ->mnojan ->tajax -> melajan ->lmwan *******: pins~ɕβkan ->maripa ->plmwan ->s~ɕlamaw ->taβuk ->s~ɕqojaw -> quri s~ɕqaβu ->pjanan ->tajax -> melajan ->lmwan jaw na ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq **** kja mus~ɕa s~ɕajiŋ kβħul ms~ɕjaw ħi qu qalaŋ lmwan, pijux βalaj mrkjas~ɕ wal mħriq s~ɕqu ħoɣal, mus~ɕa ħmkaŋi te ħoɣal. nanu teħuk s~ɕqu rjax na ħŋawan lɣa, jas~ɕa mwaħ ʦ~ʨikaħ qalaŋ lħa. . s~ɕinnħjan**** mwani ħija ɣa, s~ɕajiŋ kjokaj qu qalaŋ lmwan. qutux ɣa, tens~ɕinkjo, te s~ɕajiŋ lɣa,ʦ~ʨjorokjokaj. tens~ɕinkjo kjokaj ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki te qalaŋ ħoɣal. ʦ~ʨjorokjokaj lɣa, ʦ~ʨjux maki te qalaŋ tras~ɕan. qalaŋ ħoɣal, qalaŋ tras~ɕan. qqjanux***** te qutux:tmana ru tβiħi qalaŋ lmwan ħija, pmijun nħa tmana ru tβiħi, mins~ɕajiŋ qu pinnuja nħa rramat maki s~ɕqu qutux kawas~ɕ qani. ariŋ s~ɕqu tmaŋuw aβaw(te s~ɕajiŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ) lɣa, pmijun nħa tmana la, teħuk s~ɕqu te maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, lmun nħa tmana la, ru teħuk s~ɕqu te mtiju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, pmijun nħa tmana loji, kja teħuk s~ɕqu te ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kutun nħa tmana la. te s~ɕajiŋ:ali ru ruma tajal qalaŋ lmwan ħija ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕraral, pijux βalaj nħa pmijan ruma tajal. kja teħuk s~ɕqu te maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ. mħtuw kwara qu aliʔ la. te ʦ~ʨjuɣal:jutak ru kawaj ramu qalaŋ lmwan ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕraral qalaŋ lmwan wal rema pmijan jutak ru kawaj ramu. teħuk s~ɕqu te qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa, mkβwaj kwara qu jutak la. teħuk rjax qas~ɕa lɣa, lmun nħa jutak la. kawaj ramu ħija ɣa, teħuk s~ɕqu te maɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, mkβwaj qu βwaj na kawaj ramu la. kaħul s~ɕqu ɣiraŋ s~ɕkura te lljuŋ mniβu, ɣmluw s~ɕqu te mpitu βaŋ tuqij os~ɕa qalaŋ lmwan. s~ɕi s~ɕħiju mus~ɕa ru, ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu***lɣa, teħuk s~ɕu kja te mopuw s~ɕajiŋ kintħijaq nja lɣa, pteħok s~ɕu qalaŋ lmwan la. uŋat
